content.text: Deflake cross-feature-viewport-678 spec — current failure rate ~12%.
Will reproduce the flake locally, identify the race condition, and harden the spec.
Reproduced flake — race between snap-target collision and viewport scroll. Fix: poll dropzone-count before assertion. PR #10364 opened.
PR #10364 CI all green. Test-only change — no production code touched. Ready to merge.
